reviews.review_title: First time playing the game is gone
reviews.review_description: First time installing after flair tag got taken down this game was already taken down too

reviews.review_title: Why I rate this a five star(there’s typo
reviews.review_description: I’m rating this game a 5 star because I met the owner/ admin on my first day of playing he’s a nice guy and the community is clean with him sadly we went to mountains and his oculus died so we couldn’t spend much time but this game is awesome you get free long arms and the game is basically gorilla tag but better sometimes the severs don’t work and I honestly don’t care when they do I just saw someone get banned for acting like a mod but admin if you ever see this thank you for making this game and thank you for being a good admin and keeping the community happy and safe thank you and I’m still upset it didn’t land on 3
I don’t know if the camera mod is supposed to work but every time I try to make a video it’s not in my vr

reviews.review_title: Plz make me mod love this game
reviews.review_description: I love this game I will play this everyday if y’all moderators see this plz make me mod plz I’ve play this game for like a month

reviews.review_title: Why this game is so good
reviews.review_description: This game is very fun it’s got the latest cosmetics and gives u so many shiny rocks I love this game but I’m glitched and can’t rly play it but other than that it’s very good and devs keep up the good work

This is better than gtag, the amount of times I have played this game is ridiculous and the game itself was a bit boring to me but it is a good one and it was fun and the gameplay was fun and fun and I think the gameplay is great too but the game was fun to watch it with my dog so we were really happy to have it and I was very excited about the gameplay so we played it happily ever before
This game gives you long arms and has the normal gorrila tag updates and it gives me basically free stuff and I love this game and this community
This is gorilla tag but you have a lot of shiny rock and the chances of runing out of shiny rocks is 0.00000000000000000001
best gtag copy in my opinion, the fact that the differences from the original game are so minimal and that the server actually work on a version from march is crazy to me. 10/10

developer_response.body: Yep W developers, you should join discord.gg/flair-tag for more info and updates on the game!

reviews.review_description: Not really that cool. It’s better than gtag but I hope they don’t take this down at all. Its super fun but the problem is that i can’t get into public lobby’s so its boring. But it’s fun tho when i play it and branch and all. Nice game.

The game has good graphics and very fun and cool long arms and cosmetics but just like 3 minutes ago I was having fun with someone and laughing with him but the game banned me all of a sudden for no reason and the game didn’t tell me why I got banned or anything and it said I have got banned for 2 days so I don’t recommend this game by a lot.

This is the best gorilla tag fan game I ever played 
 so

reviews.review_description: i love it and can we start sending the stuff to gorilla tag
